title: End-to-end testnet payment integration test
description: Integration test (ignored by default, requires --ignored flag and live testnet): spin up two nie instances with testnet wallets, fund Alice from a pre-seeded testnet key embedded in test fixtures, Alice pays Bob 0.001 TAZ via /pay, assert Bob receives PaymentAction::Confirmed within 120 seconds. Tagged #[ignore] so CI skips unless explicitly requested.
